methodology: Crawled live site + audited source code for AdSense policy violations

pages.risk_detail: 4 unprovable claims: 'Used by thousands monthly', 'Featured in AI Overviews', '4.9 ★ rated by users', 'No trackers, no ads, no data selling' (Adsterra active). Calculator count inconsistent (124 vs 125).
pages.fix_needed: Remove/reword trust signal pills. Remove 'no ads' claim. Fix 124/125 count. Add verifiable proof or soften claims.

pages.risk_detail: Categories + search listing. Functional. '125+' claim appears. Professional-grade claim in meta.
pages.fix_needed: Verify 125+ count accuracy. Soften 'professional-grade' to 'reliable' if unprovable.

pages.risk_detail: Good content + structured data. Claims '8+ years experience' and lists credentials without verifiable links. States 'no ads that compromise UX' — misleading with active Adsterra.
pages.fix_needed: Add verifiable credential links. Fix 'no ads' language. Add last-reviewed date. Add Methodology link.

pages.risk_detail: Email, form, response time (24h), FAQ. No physical address. Contact form present.
pages.fix_needed: Add expected response time prominently. Verify form submission works.

pages.risk_detail: Good formula sources (IRS, CFPB, Federal Reserve). Specific formulas cited. Limitations section. Last-reviewed date present.
pages.fix_needed: Add this page to site-footer navigation (currently missing). Add more formula-specific sources.

pages.risk_detail: Review process documented. Formula verification steps. Expert review claim (single person). AI disclosure needed.
pages.fix_needed: Add AI-use disclosure. Add corrections policy. Add last-reviewed date.

pages.risk_detail: Standard privacy policy. Cookie consent banner present. Data collection disclosed.
pages.fix_needed: Update to mention ad technology providers if AdSense is added.

pages.risk_detail: Standard terms. Disclaimer of financial advice present.
Financial disclaimer. Last updated June 4, 2026. Indexable (robots: index, follow).
Correctly noindexed. Not in sitemap. Good content.
CRITICAL: 'Coming soon' text for Mortgage section. 'Planned Data Sections' header. Only Loan Payment Table is live. Indexable = YES despite placeholder content.
pages.fix_needed: Remove 'Coming soon' and 'Planned' sections. Either build content or noindex until ready.

pages.risk_detail: 4 scenarios, FAQ, methodology note. Good reference data.
pages.fix_needed: Expand to more scenarios. Add visual table/chart.

pages.risk_detail: Client-side AI chat requiring auth for saving. Empty state shows no content. Thin for unauthenticated users. Uses Supabase auth. In primary nav with 'highlight' styling.
pages.fix_needed: Remove from primary nav OR add substantial public content. Noindex if non-functional for public.

pages.risk_detail: Blog index exists. Phase 32 flagged 125 thin guides with near-zero impressions. Blog content quality needs audit.
pages.fix_needed: Audit blog posts for thin content. Noindex low-value guides.

pages.risk_detail: Auth page. Correctly not in sitemap. 193 lines. Should remain noindex.
Auth page. Correctly not in sitemap. 257 lines. Should remain noindex.
